response: Yes, Apify integrates with Python. Apify provides an API that you can interact with using Python to automate web scraping and data extraction tasks. You can use the `apify-client` Python package to interact with the Apify platform, manage actors, datasets, key-value stores, and more. This allows you to run Apify tasks and retrieve data directly from your Python scripts. You can install the `apify-client` package via pip and refer to the Apify documentation for detailed instructions on how to use it with Python.
